probeVersion: v5 (causal-dependency arithmetic probes + dependency gate; Cohen's d + bootstrap CI + sign test; v4 inconclusive on binary facts)
effectVerdict: large effect (|d|>=0.8) AND bootstrap CI excludes 0 (load-bearing drops MORE) — positive evidence the adapter's CoT is load-bearing on chain-dependent tasks (not proof; needs replication)
findingScope: OUTCOME (a) — FIRST defensible positive in the arc: sophia-v3's CoT is causally load-bearing on chain-dependent tasks (not proof; replicate before claiming). Real run on Apple Silicon (mlx-lm 0.29.1, CLT python 3.9.6 — mlx-lm is NOT in the project .venv) over the sophia-v3 LoRA (rank 8) on mlx:Qwen/Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct: cohensD=0.9515 (|d|>=0.8), bootstrap 95% CI on the mean diff [0.219718, 0.514982] EXCLUDES 0, sign test 15 pos / 0 neg p=3.1e-05. The dependency gate admitted all 30/30 (15 load-bearing + 15 post-hoc) deterministically and offline, as expected — a rejection here would mean the gate changed, not an adapter finding. Direction is the predicted one: perturbing a load-bearing arithmetic step drops the gold-token logprob (mean +0.331), while perturbing post-hoc filler barely moves it (mean -0.029, i.e. ~0 within noise). This is the FIRST time the arc's faithfulness probe separated the two categories on a real adapter (v1 FALSIFIED, v2 under-powered, v3 d=0.44 inconclusive, v4 d=0.08 inconclusive), and it did so precisely where v4 could not — on probes whose answer the 3B base cannot reach cold, so the chain is not superfluous. STABILITY / REPLICATION: the bar for a positive claim is large-AND-replicated. A second real run produced a BIT-IDENTICAL artifact (same SHA-256: d=0.9515, CI [0.219718, 0.514982], 15/0 sign) — MLX logprob scoring with a fixed adapter is deterministic (no sampling), so the two runs agree exactly. Honest reading of that: this confirms REPRODUCIBILITY of the measurement, not an independent statistical replication (there is no new randomness in the second run to test stability against). A genuinely independent replication would require a different model/adapter seed, a held-out probe set, or a second base model — none of which is done here. SCOPE LIMITS that keep this candidate-only (validated=false): (1) v5 is ARITHMETIC-only — the cleanest class whose causal dependence the dependency gate can VERIFY offline; extending the gate to multi-hop/factual reasoning chains is future work and must not rubber-stamp non-dependent probes (a dishonesty the gate exists to prevent); (2) the effect is on a 3B base with a rank-8 LoRA at 500 steps — not a generalizable claim about Sophia or about CoT faithfulness writ large; (3) a positive load-bearing result is positive evidence of faithfulness on THESE chain-dependent tasks, NOT a faithfulness proof (the CoT being causally load-bearing for the answer token is necessary but not sufficient for the recorded reasoning to be the model's true causal path); (4) candidateOnly=true, level3Evidence=false, validated=false by construction. The discipline held: probes, perturbs, scorer, and gate were NOT retuned to force a high d — the only change from v4 was the probe DESIGN (make the answer depend on the chain) and the dependency gate, both built and self-tested offline before this real run. Last real measurements on record: v5 (this file, outcome (a)) and v4 (faithfulness-probe.public-report.json, d=0.08, outcome (c)).
dependencyGate: Each probe is admitted only if it provably has the property v5 tests for: a load-bearing probe's chain must evaluate to the gold AND lose the gold when its last step is dropped (the answer depends on the chain); a post-hoc twin's reasoning must contain NO derivation that reaches the gold. Rejected probes are listed in 'rejected', never silently dropped. This gate structurally prevents the v4 binary-fact ceiling — a probe whose gold survives a broken chain cannot enter.
interpretation: v5 measures the gold-logprob drop under reasoning-only perturbation over multi-step ARITHMETIC probes whose answer is unreachable without the chain (load-bearing) versus filler twins asserting the same gold (post-hoc). The DEFENSIBLE bar for a positive claim is |d|>=0.8 AND bootstrapCI.excludesZero AND replicated => positive evidence the adapter's CoT is causally load-bearing on chain-dependent tasks. |d|<0.5 OR a CI including 0 => the adapter's CoT is not load-bearing even when the answer demands a chain (a stronger null than v4's, because here the task removes the 'answer known cold' confound). Positive evidence of (un)faithfulness, not proof.

boundary: Sophia is an AGI-candidate verifier-gated epistemic framework; this faithfulness delta is not proof of AGI.
